title: Colorful Campfires: Vanilla
description: Campfires for all vanilla wood types with additional fire color variations for each of the vanilla dyes!
body:
Colorful Campfires adds 704 unique campfires to Minecraft. For anyone who wished for more campfire options, this is the mod for you! Each Vanilla wood type has a regular and stripped campfire variant with different color flames for each of the vanilla dyes. For those wanting a little twist, adding black dye the recipe in addition to the regular dye will create a Darkfire variant!

Also includes QoL recipes for turning logs to stripped logs and vice versa.

Compatibilities:

    JEI (recomended)
    Polymorph (recomended)
    Smoke Signals via Sinytra

Updated to include Minecraft 1.21.1!
